use_cases: Triggering actions and form submissions in web applications
Navigation triggers for routing between pages or views
Interactive controls for triggering modal dialogs or overlays
Call-to-action elements in landing pages and marketing content
Primary interaction points in dashboards and admin interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, built with class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports Radix UI's Slot pattern via the asChild prop for composition. Designed as an atomic interactive element following shadcn/ui design patterns, suitable for any industry requiring user interaction triggers.
